steps: File formal tax reclaim with Danske Bank Custody for DKK 153,600 withheld in excess of 15% DK-NO treaty rate on Novo Nordisk dividends
Submit documentation proving Norwegian tax residency and treaty eligibility for reduced withholding rate
Reference Nordic Tax Withholding Agreement provisions allowing direct application of 15% rate for qualifying Nordic residents
Follow up within 30 days if Danske Bank requires additional documentation or Danish Tax Agency involvement
